_readme: Manifest of the reference-video corpus. The video FILES live in samples/ (gitignored — downloaded third-party content, not ours to redistribute); contact sheets in data/video-analysis/contact-sheets/ (local-only, derived from third-party frames). Measured properties are committed in analysis/reference-video-inventory.json; the human-readable audit is docs/curio/VIDEO_REFERENCE_AUDIT.md.

measurementMethod.hardCuts: scene-change detection, threshold 0.30 on 160px-scaled frames — CONSERVATIVE: text changes and continuous subject motion are not counted; a looser threshold (reviewer's earlier pass) yields slightly higher counts (e.g. military 57 vs 49). Treat cut counts as ballpark, not exact.

references.title: 8 Hard Truths That Most People Learn Too Late
Psychology Facts That Will Change How You Think
Unbelievable Dark Psychology Facts (6 Sides of Male Psychology)
Five Psychology Traits of Genuinely Good People
Reverse Psychology at the Lowest Level
Amazing Facts — Red vs Green Ant Experiment

comparisonSubject.note: the rejected jamais-vu factory render — the baseline every requirement is derived against
